description: Simplified income certificate application form used in the NiyamGuard citizen-service sandbox.

fields.label: Applicant Full Name
fields.help: Enter your full name as per Aadhaar or official record.

fields.label: District
fields.help: Enter the district where you live.
fields.simple_question: Which district do you live in?

fields.label: Village
fields.help: Enter your village or town name.
fields.simple_question: What is your village or town name?

fields.label: Monthly Income
fields.help: Enter your family's monthly income in rupees.
fields.simple_question: What is your family monthly income?

fields.label: Annual Income
fields.help: Annual income means monthly income multiplied by 12.
fields.simple_question: What is your family annual income?

fields.label: Purpose of Certificate
fields.help: Enter why you need the certificate, such as scholarship, college admission, job, pension, or other.
fields.simple_question: Why do you need this income certificate?

fields.label: Address
fields.help: Enter your full address including house number, street, village or city, mandal, district, and pin code.
